_info: Written by louwok.com/admin. index.html reads this at runtime.

menu.name: Plain Fried Rice
menu.desc: Our classic St. Louis-style fried rice with egg, bean sprouts, and green onions, wok-tossed fresh in a blazing-hot wok.

menu.name: Chicken Fried Rice
menu.desc: All-white chicken, seasoned rice, egg, bean sprouts, and green onions, wok-fired fresh to order. A St. Louis rice house classic with bold, no-frills Midwest flavor.

menu.name: Beef Fried Rice
menu.desc: Sliced beef wok-fired with seasoned rice, egg, bean sprouts, and green onions in a savory soy blend. A St. Louis rice house favorite with rich, hearty flavor that satisfies from the first bite to the last.

menu.name: Shrimp Fried Rice
menu.desc: Shrimp wok-fired with seasoned rice, egg, bean sprouts, and green onions in our signature seasoning blend. Inspired by St. Louis rice houses, this Midwest favorite brings the perfect balance of savory seafood and authentic wok-fired flavor.

menu.name: Crab Rangoon
menu.desc: A staple of the St. Louis takeout experience. Crispy golden wontons filled with a rich, creamy crab blend and fried until perfectly crunchy. Sweet, savory, and made for sharing alongside a box of wok-fired fried rice—though we won't blame you for keeping them all to yourself.

menu.name: St. Paul Sandwich (Chicken)
menu.desc: An egg foo young patty layered with seasoned chicken and served on soft white bread with crisp lettuce, tomato, onion, mayo, and pickles. A true St. Louis rice house creation rooted in Midwest carryout culture—simple, bold, and deeply satisfying, bringing a classic corner-shop favorite from St. Louis to Phoenix in true Lou Wok style.

menu.name: Pineapple Chicken Fried Rice
menu.desc: Tender chicken, sweet pineapple, and wok-fired rice come together in the perfect balance of savory and sweet. A bold twist on a Midwest favorite, cooked fresh to order with Lou Wok flavor in every bite.

menu.name: Ultimate Fried Rice
menu.desc: A loaded feast of our signature St. Louis-style fried rice piled high with egg, tender chicken, juicy shrimp, savory beef, and fresh vegetables, all wok-fired together with our house seasoning for the ultimate Rice House experience.

menu.name: Fried Chicken
menu.desc: Crispy, seasoned chicken fried golden brown and served hot and fresh. 4 piece or 8 piece

menu.name: Vess Soda
menu.desc: A St. Louis original and a staple in every rice house across the city. Ice-cold, bold, and nostalgic, Vess Soda has been a Midwest carryout favorite for generations. The perfect sweet finish to a box of fried rice, St. Paul sandwiches, or crispy wings—straight from St. Louis tradition to your Lou Wok meal.

menu.name: St. Paul Sandwich (Veggie)
menu.desc: Fresh cabbage, carrots, and vegetables wrapped in a crispy shell and fried golden brown. Light, crunchy, and the perfect sidekick to a box of Lou Wok fried rice.

menu.name: St. Paul Sandwich (Deluxe)
menu.desc: A St. Louis rice house favorite built your way. Choose any two proteins—chicken, shrimp, or beef—stacked on our signature egg foo young patty and served on soft white bread with mayo, crisp lettuce, tomato, cheese, and pickles. A Midwest takeout classic that helped define the St. Paul tradition, now served fresh in Phoenix.

menu.name: Mystic Carrot Juice
menu.desc: A bright, refreshing blend of carrot and fruit juices with a smooth, naturally sweet finish. Served ice-cold, it’s the nostalgic Midwest drink that pairs perfectly with fried rice, St. Paul sandwiches, and crispy wings—Lou Wok style.

menu.name: Bottled Water
menu.desc: 16.9 fl oz. bottle of water on chill.

menu.name: Lou Wok Box Combo
menu.desc: The combo that inspired it all. A full order of our signature St. Louis-style fried rice, an Original St. Paul Sandwich, four pieces of golden fried chicken, four crispy crab rangoons, and your choice of Vess Soda or Mystic Carrot Juice. Straight from the St. Louis rice house tradition, brought to Phoenix and cooked fresh to order with Midwest flavor and wok-fired soul.

menu.name: Egg Rolls (Chicken)
menu.desc: Golden, crispy, and packed with seasoned chicken, cabbage, celery, and savory spices, our chicken egg roll is the perfect sidekick to any Lou Wok meal. A St. Louis takeout classic done the Midwest way. Hot, crunchy, and made for dipping.

menu.name: Egg Roll (Veggie)
menu.desc: Fresh cabbage, carrots, and vegetables wrapped in a crispy shell and fried golden brown. Light, crunchy, and the perfect sidekick to a box of Lou Wok fried rice.

seo.title: Lou Wok Rice House | St. Louis Style Chinese Fried Rice & St. Paul Sandwiches in Phoenix, AZ
seo.description: Lou Wok Rice House brings authentic St. Louis-style fried rice to Phoenix, inspired by the legendary Chinese takeout flavors of St. Louis. Enjoy wok-fired chicken, beef, shrimp, and vegetable fried rice, crispy fried chicken, and iconic St. Paul sandwiches.
seo.keywords: St. Louis Style Fried Rice, Chinese Fried Rice, Chicken Fried Rice, Shrimp Fried Rice, Combo Fried Rice, Wok Fried Rice, Best Fried Rice Phoenix, St. Louis Chinese Food, St. Paul Sandwich, Chinese Food Phoenix, Fried Chicken and Fried Rice, Rice House Style Fried Rice, Authentic Fried Rice, Takeout Fried Rice, Loaded Fried Rice, Phoenix Food Truck, Lou Wok Rice House, Original St. Louis Fried Rice

featured.label: Featured Item
featured.title:
THE ST. PAUL
SANDWICH
featured.desc: A St. Louis Chinese takeout classic. Our golden egg-crusted patty is stacked on white bread with crisp lettuce, tomato, pickles, and mayo for a one-of-a-kind sandwich that's been a hometown favorite for generations.

details.label: The Sandwich, The Myth, The Legend

branding.name: Lou Wok Rice House
branding.tagline: Wok-fired Midwest flavor. St. Louis roots. Phoenix made.
branding.footerCredit: Built with fire in the Valley

settings.pickupInstructions: Pickup only. Estimated Wait Time 10-15 minutes
